title: ICAR IARI Part-time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: ICAR Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR IARI) Part time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification has been released on the official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the ICAR IARI Part time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 65 years who have MBBS or equivalent degree are eligible to apply for this Part time Medical Officer vacancy. The email application process for ICAR IARI Part time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 has started and will remain open until 16-06-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and app

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 65 years (as on 01 June 2026) Age relaxation is relaxable in exceptional cases on a case-to-case basis. However, no engagement shall be permissible beyond 70 years under any circumstances.

qualification.details: MBBS or equivalent degree from a recognized university/institution and should be registered with the National Medical Commission (NMC)/State Medical Council/other statutory body as per legal requirement for practicing medical treatment. Preference may be given to candidates with a minimum of 05 years of relevant experience in a Government/Autonomous/Private hospital setup.

selection_process: Application Screening Walk-in Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR IARI Part time Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
